about.story_text: Simons Fine Art Framing & Gallery stands out as a locally owned artist-driven business that prioritizes affordable, high-quality framing services.
about.founder_note: Built for people who value quality, clarity, and a smooth process.

features.title: Quality Work
features.description: Simons Fine Art Framing & Gallery stands out as a locally owned artist-driven business that prioritizes affordable, high-quality framing services. Built with care and attention to detail you can trust.

features.title: Quality-First Results
features.description: Every detail is handled carefully so the finished result looks clean, sharp, and consistent. Built with care and attention to detail you can trust.

features.title: Service Highlight 3
features.description: Clear, professional work designed to make the next step easy. Built with care and attention to detail you can trust.

processSteps.title: Understand goals and constraints
processSteps.description: We start by clarifying priorities, fit, and the quality standard you want so the plan matches reality. Built with care and attention to detail you can trust.

processSteps.title: Choose the right approach
processSteps.description: We recommend an approach that protects craftsmanship and sets expectations before work starts. Built with care and attention to detail you can trust.

processSteps.title: Deliver with care
processSteps.description: Execution focuses on detail, finish, and a result that holds up to scrutiny. Built with care and attention to detail you can trust.
